Our Services

Complete fire alarm solutions tailored to your property's unique requirements

Fire Alarm Design & Installation

Complete design-build services for new construction and retrofit projects. NICET Level IV certified engineers ensure code compliance from day one.

Design-BuildCode CompliancePermit Coordination

24/7 Monitoring

Round-the-clock central station monitoring with rapid response protocols. UL-listed facility ensures your property is always protected.

24/7/365 MonitoringRapid ResponseUL Listed

Inspections & Maintenance

NFPA-compliant inspection and maintenance programs. Keep your systems operational and avoid citation risks.

NFPA CompliantCertified TechniciansDetailed Reporting

Emergency Repairs

24/7 emergency service when you need it most. Fast response times minimize downtime and protect lives.

24/7 AvailabilityFast ResponseAll Brands Serviced

System Upgrades

Modernize aging fire alarm systems with current technology. Improve reliability and meet evolving code requirements.

Technology UpgradesCode UpdatesCost Optimization
